channel.title: Business - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

  5. Oil prices fall as Trump arrives in China amid stalemate with Iran  CNBC

item.title: How Eight Tumultuous Years Pushed Jerome Powell and the Fed to the Limit - WSJ
item.description:
1. How Eight Tumultuous Years Pushed Jerome Powell and the Fed to the Limit  WSJ
  2. Opinion | He Was Good at Steering the Fed, but He Was a Genius at Ignoring Trump’s Threats  The New York Times
  3. Jerome Powell Exits With Legacy as the Fed Chair Who Fought Back  Bloomberg.com
  4. Powell’s tenure underscores economic impact of pandemic, Claudia Sahm underscores  Traders Union
  5. Market Thoughts: Breathe deeper?  J.P. Morgan Private Bank
